sub_modules.gaussian3x3_stencil: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian weighted stencil sum with coefficients 1,2,1 / 2,4,2 / 1,2,1.
sub_modules.gaussian3x3_normalize: Combinational divide-by-16 normalization for the Gaussian stencil sum.
sub_modules.high_frequency_subtract: Combinational signed pointwise subtraction computing original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.gain_scale: Combinational signed scaling of high-frequency component by the runtime gain factor.
sub_modules.reconstruct_saturate: Combinational reconstruction and saturation to the output pixel range.
